entries.title: B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering
Software Development Intern
bulletPoints: Developed an internal network monitoring dashboard using Python, Flask, and MySQL to track real-time network performance metrics across multiple towers.
Built REST APIs for data aggregation from network devices and integrated SMS alert system using Twilio API for critical failures.
Designed the frontend using React.js with interactive charts to visualize tower uptime, signal strength, and customer complaints.
Implemented user authentication and role-based access control for network engineers and managers.
Deployed the application on AWS EC2 and documented the entire system architecture and API endpoints.
